ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, image frame borders, structural lines

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Secondary body text, subdued labels

warm-ash.$description: Warm Ash — Muted helper text, link borders, link text, decorative dividers

plaster-white.$description: Plaster White — Page canvas, card surfaces, image backgrounds

sans-serif.$description: sans-serif — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

system-ui.$description: All text uses the OS system font stack. 16px weight 500 carries the bio paragraph and link text; 12px weight 400 covers the small link row (Email · Twitter · LinkedIn) and metadata. The deliberate choice of native system fonts — no custom typeface, no webfont load — keeps the chrome weightless and lets the photographs be the only typographic event on the page.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full page background — the only surface in the system

image-tile.$description: Surface level 1: White backstop behind photographs, 10px-clipped to the image
